CREATE TABLE test_numbers (val1 UInt8, val2 UInt8, val3 UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY val1;
INSERT INTO test_numbers VALUES (1, 5, 3), (2, 0, 4), (3, 3, 3), (4, 2, 1);
SELECT greatest(val1, val2, val3) AS max_value FROM test_numbers;
CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date, value UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now(), 10), (now() + toIntervalDay(1), 5), (now() + toIntervalDay(3), 2);
SELECT event_date, greatest(value, 6, 7) AS greatest_value FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_strings (str1 String, str2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY str1;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('apple', 'banana'), ('pear', 'kiwi'), ('grape', 'orange');
SELECT greatest(str1, str2) AS max_string FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE complex_values (id UInt8, num1 Float64, num2 Float64, str1 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO complex_values VALUES (1, 1.5, 2.5, 'abc'), (2, 3.0, 1.0, 'xyz'), (3, 2.1, 2.1, 'def');
SELECT id, greatest(num1, num2, toFloat64(4.0)) AS max_num FROM complex_values;
CREATE TABLE nested_table AS (SELECT id, val1, val2 FROM (SELECT id, greatest(1, 2, 3) AS val1, greatest(val1, 2) AS val2 FROM test_numbers));
SELECT id, max(val1) AS max_val1, greatest(max_val1, 5) FROM nested_table GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE join_table1 (id UInt8, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE join_table2 (id UInt8, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO join_table1 VALUES (1, 1.2), (2, 2.5), (3, 3.0);
INSERT INTO join_table2 VALUES (1, 4.1), (2, 2.0), (3, 3.5);
SELECT a.id, greatest(a.value, b.value) AS max_value FROM join_table1 AS a JOIN join_table2 AS b ON a.id = b.id;
CREATE TABLE inner_query_test (val1 UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY val1;
INSERT INTO inner_query_test VALUES (1), (3), (2);
SELECT greatest((SELECT max(val1) FROM inner_query_test), 5) AS final_greatest;
